nasb.text: These six cities shall be for refuge for the sons of Israel, and for the alien and for the sojourner among them; that anyone who kills a person unintentionally may flee there.

esv.text: These six cities shall be for refuge for the people of Israel, and for the stranger and for the sojourner among them, that anyone who kills any person without intent may flee there.

cnv.text: 這六座城要給以色列人和外族人，以及他們中間居住的人作避難城，使無心殺人的人，都可以逃到那裡去。

ccb.text: 凡误杀人的，无论是以色列人还是寄居的外族人，都可以逃到这些城避难。
